title.en: Ye Tian summoned the other party.

content.en:
"Your Excellency wants the Original Source Solution?"

Ye Tian summoned the other party.

The Triple Supreme replied, "Yes, Your Excellency has the Primordial Source Liquid on you?"

"Trading space, more talk?"

Ye Tian proposed.

"Yes!"

Rushing!!

Two people entered a trading space, and only two people were allowed to enter, in such a trading space that no other supreme could snoop on, participate in, or destroy.

"I need the Eternal Ancient Pine Leaf!"

Ye Tian said directly.

The Triple Supreme One nodded and said, "I have an Eternal Ancient Pine Leaf in my hand, and a drop of Primordial Source Liquid is exchanged for an Eternal Ancient Pine Leaf. "

"This value is not equal!" Ye Tian shook his head and said, "The Primordial Source Liquid One Tier One Supreme One Hundred Percent Breakthrough to the Twin Primordial Primordial Primordial Primordial Essence, but the Eternal Ancient Pine Leaf can't guarantee it. "

The other party said in a deep voice, "The Primordial Source Liquid is defective and will reduce its potential, but the Eternal Ancient Pine Leaf will not. "

Ye Tian said with a smile: "The flaw of the Primordial Source Liquid is not a defect at all for the Supreme who wants to break through with the Primordial Origin Liquid, if you want to be promoted to the Half-Step Eternal Realm, you will not trade the Primordial Origin Liquid." "

"And what price do you say?" the other man relented.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment and said, "A drop of Primordial Source Liquid needs to be traded for two Eternal Ancient Pine Leaves plus 10,000 Inferior Eternal Coins. "

"That's too high!"

The other party frowned.

Ye Tian had an indifferent attitude and said, "If you are willing to trade, you can trade, if you don't want to, then forget it!"

Although the Eternal Ancient Pine Leaf is rare, it can still be found today, but the Primordial Source Liquid will no longer be born, only a few of the Ancient Supreme Beings still have a small amount in their hands, or not necessarily there.

If it weren't for Ye Tian extorting a little Primordial Essence from Xingzu, there would be no way to obtain Primordial Essence now.

Therefore, he is not afraid that the other party will not trade.

If the other party was really unwilling to trade, he could easily trade other treasures similar to the Eternal Ancient Pine Leaf with the Primordial Source Liquid.

"Okay, I agree!"

The other party said.

Under the witness of the Origin God Pavilion Instrument Spirit, Ye Tian completed the transaction with the other party.

After the transaction was completed, Ye Tian came out of the trading space, walked around again, and traded some treasures that were conducive to a breakthrough and had no sequelae, but the grade was not as good as the eternal ancient pine leaves.

Suddenly.

One of the Supreme Beings said, "I know of the entrance to a low-level Eternal Tribulation Domain, who wants to enter it?" However, the entrance of that low-level Eternal Tribulation Domain is not very stable, so it can only allow less than 100 one-two-three-tier supreme beings to enter it at a time, otherwise it will easily cause the entrance to collapse. In order to prevent the entrance from collapsing, this time I only brought 90 supreme beings below the quadruple level into it, and now I will start selling places. "

"What, you've discovered the entrance to a low-level Eternal Tribulation Domain. "

Many of the Supreme Beings were shocked.

Ye Tian also heard it, and immediately became interested.

The Eternal Tribulation Domain is not an ordinary place, it is the Tribulation Beasts of more than 100,000 Tribulation Yuan After breaking a certain boundary, they will become the Eternal Tribulation Clan, these Eternal Tribulation Clans are similar to the Supreme One, and some Eternal Tribulation Clans will unite to evolve into the Eternal Tribulation Domain in the depths of the void.

The low-level Eternal Tribulation Domain only allows one, two, and three supreme beings to enter it, the intermediate Eternal Tribulation Domain only allows four, five, or six supreme beings to enter it, and the high-level Eternal Tribulation Domain allows seven, eight, or nine supreme beings to enter it.

The Supreme Eternal Tribulation Domain allows the half-step Eternal Realm to enter it.

It was precisely because of the existence of the Eternal Tribulation Domain that the Source Sea could hardly see a tribulation beast comparable to the Supreme.

Because, almost all of the tribulation beasts comparable to the Supreme One are in the Eternal Tribulation Domain.

The tribulation beasts that are comparable to the Supreme are called the Eternal Tribulation Clan, they are different from the Tribulation Beasts, the wisdom of the Tribulation Beasts is not very high, but the Eternal Tribulation Clan has developed into a race, their strength is not only strong, but also has a high level of understanding, they can create supreme skills, and they can cultivate, without the need to grow with the help of the Great Tribulation.

The strength of the Eternal Tribulation Clan is very strong and relatively united, if the growth rate of the Eternal Tribulation Clan is too slow and it has been hunted down by the Supreme, otherwise it would have definitely developed into the top racial force in the Source Sea.

The value of any Eternal Tribulation is comparable to an Eternal Source Artifact, because the Eternal Tribulation Clan's body will not only contain Tribulation Blood, Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal, and Robbery Bone, but also contain a very precious substance - Eternal Tribulation Crystal.

The Eternal Hedron is one of the rare treasures that can temper the Eternal Body.

The Supreme One who has condensed the Eternal Body, or the ordinary Eternal Body, needs to continue to be refined.

For example, Ye Tian's Endless Eternal Body is currently in the entry stage.

Entry, small success, big success, completion.

These are the four realms of the Eternal!

If you want to refine the Eternal Body, ordinary resources are of no use at all, but the Eternal Tribulation Crystal has such an effect.

However, the Eternal Tribulation Crystal not only has an effect on the Eternal Body, but also has a huge effect on the ordinary Eternal Tribulation Body, so this resource is almost in short supply and cannot be purchased at all.

Therefore, if you want to obtain the Eternal Tribulation Crystal, you can only choose the Eternal Tribulation Hunt.

But the Eternal Tribulation Clan is almost hidden in the Eternal Tribulation Domain, and it can't be found at all.

Because of this, hearing about the existence of a low-level Eternal Tribulation Domain this time was a great opportunity for some One, Two, and Triple Beings, especially for the Triple Ones.

Of course, the Eternal Tribulation Domain is also very dangerous, and if you don't put your mind to it, you will fall.

For example, a supreme person would hardly dare to enter the Eternal Tribulation Domain, which was the territory of the Eternal Tribulation Clan after all, and if it was surrounded, there was no way to ask for support.

However, a handful of Triple Beings were ready to take the plunge and sought out the Supreme One to buy a spot.

The Supreme One is also a Triple Supreme One, and thus will also enter the Eternal Tribulation Realm.

The price of the quota is not expensive, only 10,000 eternal coins are needed.

But ninety places, that's equivalent to 900,000 eternal coins!

But this kind of transaction can only be done once, after all, there are already other supreme beings who know the entrance and location, and they will definitely publicize it, how can he sell places?

Many Supreme Beings are actually waiting for the next opportunity, not wanting to waste Eternal Coins.

Ye Tian didn't want to waste time, in case there were not many Eternal Tribulation Clans inside, wouldn't he not be able to get benefits if he waited for the next opportunity?

Even if it's really dangerous inside, he is not afraid, after all, he is copying his body into it, and he is not afraid of danger at all.

So, Ye Tian paid 10,000 eternal coins and bought a place.

The time to enter the Eternal Calamity was after this assembly, which would continue for millions of years.

Ye Tian immediately left the Source God Pavilion, he was ready to immediately impact the Dual Supreme Realm, if the breakthrough was successful, his strength would soar, and if he entered the low-level Eternal Tribulation Domain, he would gain more.

In order to ensure that he could break through in time when he was heading to the Eternal Tribulation Domain, he activated the Time Acceleration Array.

Immediately, he took out two Eternal Ancient Pine Leaves and other treasures, and prepared to attack the Dual Supreme Realm in the Void Source Hall.
